pages.title: Happy Easter Puzzle Quest
pages.description:
Match colorful Easter themed tiles using puzzle solving mechanics while clearing boards filled with festive eggs, candies, and spring symbols. Connect identical pieces to remove them from the grid and open space for new combinations. Complete puzzle objectives across relaxing stages while improving pattern recognition and progressing through increasingly complex layouts.

Key Features

• Tile matching puzzle mechanics
• Easter themed puzzle boards
• Pattern recognition challenges
• Level based progression system
• Colorful spring holiday visuals
